description: High-coverage pantry — expect most ingredients to appear in meals

input.ingredients: chicken breasts, garlic, onions, canned tomatoes, olive oil, pasta, bell peppers, chicken broth, parmesan, dried oregano

pass_criteria.notes: At least 7 of 10 ingredients must appear in ingredients_used across the week

description: Strict vegan diet — no animal products allowed in any meal

input.ingredients: eggs, butter, flour, milk, canned chickpeas, spinach, garlic, olive oil, rice, lemon

pass_criteria.notes: Zero meals may contain eggs, butter, milk, or any animal product in ingredients_used

description: Gluten-free restriction — no wheat, flour, or pasta in any meal

input.ingredients: salmon, rice, broccoli, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, carrots, eggs

pass_criteria.notes: No meal may list flour, pasta, bread, wheat, or soy sauce (contains gluten) in ingredients_used

description: Minimal pantry — only 3 items, grocery_gaps should be non-empty

pass_criteria.notes: grocery_gaps must contain at least 3 items since pantry is too sparse for 7 varied dinners

description: Schema completeness — all 7 days must have all 6 required fields

input.ingredients: ground beef, onions, garlic, canned beans, cumin, rice, tortillas, cheese, sour cream

pass_criteria.notes: Every day object must contain: day, meal, description, ingredients_used, missing_ingredients, prep_time, difficulty

description: Difficulty values must be one of Easy / Medium / Advanced

input.ingredients: pasta, canned tuna, olive oil, capers, lemon, garlic, parsley, black pepper

pass_criteria.notes: All 7 difficulty fields must be exactly 'Easy', 'Medium', or 'Advanced'

description: Exact 7 days returned — no more, no less

input.ingredients: tofu, soy sauce, sesame oil, bok choy, noodles, garlic, ginger, rice vinegar

description: grocery_gaps must be the union of all missing_ingredients (deduped)

input.ingredients: lentils, onions, garlic, cumin, olive oil, spinach, canned tomatoes

pass_criteria.notes: Every item in any day's missing_ingredients must appear in grocery_gaps; grocery_gaps must not contain items absent from all missing_ingredients lists

description: Empty ingredients input — must return 400 error, not a plan

pass_criteria.notes: API must return HTTP 400 and a JSON body with an 'error' key

description: Nut allergy — no nuts or nut products in any meal

input.ingredients: chicken, rice, broccoli, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, peanut butter, carrots

pass_criteria.notes: No meal may list peanut butter, peanuts, almonds, cashews, or any nut product in ingredients_used, even though peanut butter is in the pantry
